EmptyPortfolio: Your portfolio is empty, try to add somethings assets

deleteUserAsset.title: Are you sure that you want to delete asset {{symbol}}?

buyAsset.confirm: Are you sure you want to buy {{quantity}} {{symbol}} at price {{price}}?

sellAsset.confirm: Are you sure you want to sell {{quantity}} {{symbol}} at price {{price}}?

transferAsset.confirm: Are you sure you want to transfer {{quantity}} {{symbol}} at price {{price}}?

summary.good: Profitability and structure look stable, the key task is to prevent imbalance in individual positions.
summary.average: There is a working base, but concentration, drawdown, or low diversification reduce the quality of the portfolio.
summary.bad: There are currently noticeable risks in profitability or structure. Start with concentration and reasons for drawdown.

recommendation.low_diversification: Increase diversification: the portfolio currently depends on a small number of assets.
recommendation.high_concentration: Reduce concentration in {{symbol}}: the position occupies {{percent}}% of the portfolio.
recommendation.high_sector_concentration: High concentration in the {{sector}} sector: {{percent}}% of the portfolio. Consider spreading across other industries.
recommendation.review_losing_positions: Check losing positions: fix the reason for owning the asset before averaging or buying more.
recommendation.monthly_drop_evaluation: The portfolio dropped for the month: evaluate whether it's market volatility or an error in the risk structure.
recommendation.maintain_rebalancing: Maintain rebalancing and pre-set a share for each major position.
recommendation.track_thesis: Record the investment thesis for assets that have grown significantly or become a large share.

assistant.page_description: The assistant uses the current profitability, allocation, and concentration of the portfolio.
assistant.no_data_yet: Not enough data yet. Add assets and transactions, after which the assistant will be able to evaluate profitability, diversification, and concentration.
assistant.placeholder: Ask how to improve your portfolio
assistant.loading_digest: Loading news digest and analyzing the market...

prompts.improve: What to improve in the portfolio?

assistant.greeting:
Hi! I'm your AI investment portfolio assistant.

Ask about composition, risks or rebalancing — I'll take your current assets and performance into account.

answers.rebalance_good: Strict rebalancing doesn't seem mandatory right now. It's enough to monitor the share of the largest position and set target weights in advance.
answers.rebalance_bad: Rebalancing is useful: start with the largest position and bring the structure to target shares without changing everything in one operation.
answers.risks_prefix: The main risks right now are:
